personalize.dataset.datasetimportjob.Cfn:
Describes a job that imports training data from a data source (Amazon S3 bucket) to an Amazon Personalize dataset. 

A dataset import job can be in one of the following states:
+ CREATE PENDING > CREATE IN_PROGRESS > ACTIVE -or- CREATE FAILED

If you specify a dataset import job as part of a dataset, all dataset import job fields are required.

personalize.dataset.datasetimportjob.Dat.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset that receives the imported data.
The ARN of the dataset import job.
The Amazon S3 bucket that contains the training data to import.

personalize.dataset.datasetimportjob.Job.Description: The name of the import job.

personalize.dataset.datasetimportjob.Rol.Description: The ARN of the IAM role that has permissions to read from the Amazon S3 data source.
